title: Form viewer in Dark Mode
excerpt:
I use Dark mode all the time.  The new form viewer “workform submission viewer” doesn’t work in dark mode so I have to switch to light mode just to pdf the forms each time. 
Can some adjustment to the contrast be made fo…

posts.author: christinap (Christina Punchard)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use Dark mode all the time. The new form viewer “workform submission viewer” doesn’t work in dark mode so I have to switch to light mode just to pdf the forms each time.
Can some adjustment to the contrast be made for dark mode users please?
